channel.title: Sandbox on Anekoique's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Sandbox on Anekoique's Blog

item.title: Virtualization Systems — gVisor
item.description: Google’s userspace-kernel sandbox: Sentry, a Go reimplementation of the Linux syscall ABI, services guest syscalls intercepted via KVM / ptrace / systrap platforms. Production isolation behind App Engine, Cloud Run, and Cloud Functions.
